text:
Galvatron is a Decepticon from the ' series. He is the leader of the Decepticons and the rebuilt version of Megatron.

Transformers Mode "EVA"
 
Upon gaining the power of an Angel by possessing its body, Starscream mused about using his newfound power against Galvatron for revenge, but he first decided to get rid of Optimus Prime once and for all. https://tfwiki.net/wiki/Galvatron_(G1)#Transformers_.C3.97_Evangelion
